scope.assignment: Project-level custom role bound to the generated deployment service account
scope.project_setup: API enablement and project creation are explicit known gaps for separating bootstrap identity from deployment identity.
scope.region_assumption: Primary GCP deployment region, default europe-west1.

constraints: GCP custom role permission names must stay wildcard-free.

conditions.reason: serviceusage.services.enable and IAM custom-role mutation permissions are retained in thesis-demo-v1 while the final bootstrap/deployment split is validated.

known_gaps.reason: serviceusage and IAM role mutation permissions likely belong only to bootstrap identity in least-privilege-v2.
GCP does not currently provide first-class managed Digital Twin and Managed Grafana equivalents in this deployment model.

verification.live_smoke: Run only during supervised cloud validation; default automated tests must not mutate GCP.
